children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.name:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.originalText:
IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.name:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.originalText:
IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

children.label: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.name: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.originalText:
SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USERIDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: MOVEUSERIDIOFCO
children.name: MOVEUSERIDIOFCO
children.originalText: MOVE USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-ID

children.label: MOVEFNAMEIOFCOU
children.name: MOVEFNAMEIOFCOU
children.originalText: MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME

children.label: MOVELNAMEIOFCOU
children.name: MOVELNAMEIOFCOU
children.originalText: MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME

children.label: MOVEPASSWDIOFCO
children.name: MOVEPASSWDIOFCO
children.originalText: MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-PWD

children.label: MOVEUSRTYPEIOFC
children.name: MOVEUSRTYPEIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
               MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
               MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
               MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
               PERFORM WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
               MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
               MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
               MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
               PERFORM WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USERIDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
               MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
               MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
               MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
               PERFORM WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF

children.label: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.name: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
       
       
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 ​​​​ ​​​​
               ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.name: MOVEWS-MESSAGET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.name: PERFORMPOPULATE
children.originalText:
PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.name: MOVECCDA-TITLE0
children.originalText: MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.name: MOVEWS-TRANIDTO
children.originalText: MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.name: MOVEWS-PGMNAMET
children.originalText: MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURDATE-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.name: MOVEWS-CURTIME-
children.originalText: MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR1AO

children.label: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.name: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.originalText:
MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR1AO.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR1AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been added ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 8 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID already exist...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
       
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Add User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: _DIALECT_5​​​​
children.name: _DIALECT_5​​​​
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 5 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​   ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR1AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been added ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 8 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID already exist...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
       
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Add User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

children.label: MOVESPACESTOUSE
children.name: MOVESPACESTOUSE
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES          TO USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE

children.label: MOVE-1TOFNAMELO
children.name: MOVE-1TOFNAMELO
children.originalText:
MOVE -1              TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.

label: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/f97064aa-7c96-4701-94a8-f9d30e92178f
name: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/f97064aa-7c96-4701-94a8-f9d30e92178f
originalText:
MAIN-PARA.
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USERIDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
               MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
               MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
               MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
               PERFORM WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.
       
           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
       
       
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 ​​​​ ​​​​
               ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       
       SEND-USRADD-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR1AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       RECEIVE-USRADD-SCREEN.
       
           _DIALECT_ 4 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.
       
           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR1AO.
       
       
       
       
       WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​   ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR1AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been added ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 8 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID already exist...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
       
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Add User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
           PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN.
       
       
       
       
       INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
       
           MOVE -1              TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO USERIDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR1AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR1AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.
